templates.title: Extreme Sports Adrenaline Rush
templates.description: High-octane extreme sports capture with dynamic camera work and dramatic angles

prompt.main: Extreme sports athlete performing death-defying stunts captured with ultra-high-speed cameras. Multiple angles showcase the intensity - helmet cam POV, drone aerial tracking, and ground-level impact shots. Visible determination in facial expressions, muscle tension, and explosive movements. Environmental elements like dust clouds, water spray, or snow particles enhance the action. Sharp focus on critical moments with motion blur emphasizing speed.

elements.cameraMovement: FPV drone racing alongside action, rapid whip pans, crash zooms on key moments, gimbal-stabilized tracking shots
elements.subject: Extreme sports athlete mid-action - skydiver, BMX rider, parkour runner, wingsuit flyer, or cliff diver
elements.scene: Dramatic natural locations - mountain peaks, urban rooftops, ocean cliffs, desert canyons
elements.motion: Explosive movements, aerial rotations, high-speed impacts, gravity-defying trajectories
elements.lighting: High contrast natural light, lens flares for drama, backlighting through particles
elements.style: Red Bull Media House meets GoPro Hero footage

technicalSpecs.frameRate: 120-240 fps for slow motion, 24 fps playback
technicalSpecs.colorGrading: High contrast, saturated colors, crushed blacks
technicalSpecs.audioDesign: Heart beat, heavy breathing, wind rush, impact sounds

modifiedElements.lighting: LED light trails, urban neon, headlamp beams

bestPractices: Use multiple camera angles for comprehensive coverage
Prioritize safety while capturing dangerous stunts
Sync high-speed footage with regular speed for impact
Use motion tracking for smooth follows

examples.sampleOutput: Red Bull Rampage highlights, X Games coverage

templates.title: Athletic Training Intensity Sequences
templates.description: Raw, powerful training montages showcasing dedication and physical transformation

prompt.main: Intense training sequence capturing athletes pushing their physical limits. Close-ups on straining muscles, beads of sweat, focused expressions. Dynamic camera work follows explosive movements - weightlifting, sprinting, boxing combinations. Intercut between different training stations showing variety and progression. Visible transformation through lighting that emphasizes muscle definition and athletic form.

elements.cameraMovement: Handheld energy, slider push-ins on effort, 360-degree orbits around lifts, speed ramps on explosive moves
elements.subject: Professional athlete or fitness enthusiast in peak training mode
elements.scene: High-performance gym, outdoor training ground, boxing ring, track field
elements.motion: Explosive lifts, rapid-fire combinations, sprint bursts, plyometric jumps
elements.lighting: Harsh gym lighting, dramatic shadows, rim lighting on sweat
elements.style: Rocky training montage meets modern CrossFit aesthetic

technicalSpecs.audioDesign: Heavy breathing, weight clanks, motivational shouts

bestPractices: Capture multiple angles of key exercises
Use speed ramping to emphasize power moments
Include close-ups of effort and determination
Match cuts on similar movements for flow

examples.sampleOutput: Nike Training Club videos, UFC Embedded series

templates.title: Victory Celebration Moments
templates.description: Emotional triumph captures with euphoric reactions and team celebrations

prompt.main: Euphoric victory celebration captured at the moment of triumph. Slow-motion emotional reactions - tears of joy, triumphant roars, team embraces. Multiple perspectives capture the raw emotion - tight close-ups on faces, wide shots of stadium eruptions, player POV of cheering crowds. Confetti, champagne spray, and trophy lifts in glorious detail. The culmination of dedication and dreams realized.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth crane rise revealing crowd, handheld rush into celebration, slow dolly around embraces
elements.subject: Victorious athletes in their moment of triumph
elements.scene: Stadium, podium, finish line, championship venue
elements.motion: Jumping celebrations, fist pumps, emotional collapses, group pile-ons
elements.lighting: Stadium floods, golden hour glow, spotlight on champions
elements.style: ESPN championship moments meets Olympic glory

technicalSpecs.colorGrading: Warm, golden tones, high key brightness
technicalSpecs.audioDesign: Crowd roar, emotional music swell, champion breathing

bestPractices: Use slow motion to extend key moments
Mix wide and tight shots for impact

examples.sampleOutput: World Cup final celebrations, Olympic gold medal moments

templates.title: Sports Equipment Performance Demos
templates.description: Technical showcase of sports gear with detailed performance demonstrations

prompt.main: High-tech sports equipment showcase with precision demonstration of features and performance. Macro shots reveal material textures, construction details, and innovative technology. Equipment in action - slow-motion impact tests, flexibility demonstrations, aerodynamic visualizations. Split-screen comparisons showing equipment advantages. Clean, clinical presentation with data overlays and performance metrics.

elements.cameraMovement: Precise motorized sliders, rotating product turntables, probe lens details, motion control rigs
elements.subject: Premium sports equipment - shoes, rackets, bikes, protective gear
elements.scene: Professional studio, testing facility, real-world performance environment
elements.motion: Controlled demonstrations, stress tests, performance comparisons
elements.lighting: Clean studio lighting, dramatic rim lights, LED accent highlighting
elements.style: Apple product launch meets Nike innovation lab

bestPractices: Use motion control for precise movements

examples.sampleOutput: Nike Vaporfly launch video, Callaway driver technology demo

templates.title: Team Spirit and Unity Shots
templates.description: Powerful team bonding moments showcasing collective strength and camaraderie

prompt.main: Dynamic team unity showcase capturing the power of collective spirit. Pre-game huddles with stacked hands, synchronized warm-ups, tactical discussions. Emotional support between teammates, celebratory group reactions, and unified movements. Wide shots establish team formation, while intimate close-ups capture individual connections within the group. The strength of many acting as one.

elements.cameraMovement: Circular dolly around huddles, crane shots of formations, steadicam weaving through players
elements.subject: Sports team displaying unity and coordination
elements.scene: Locker room, field/court, training ground, team bus
elements.motion: Synchronized movements, group celebrations, team rituals
elements.lighting: Atmospheric locker room light, stadium lights, dawn training sessions
elements.atmosphere: Brotherhood/sisterhood, trust, collective power, shared purpose
elements.style: Friday Night Lights meets All or Nothing documentary

technicalSpecs.audioDesign: Team chants, motivational speeches, synchronized movements

modifiedElements.lighting: Golden hour or night game lights

bestPractices: Use movement to show group dynamics
Include both wide and intimate shots

examples.sampleOutput: All Blacks Haka, NBA pre-game rituals

templates.title: Individual Skill Showcases
templates.description: Masterful display of individual athletic prowess and technical skill

prompt.main: Precision skill demonstration highlighting individual athletic mastery. Ultra-slow motion captures perfect form - ball control, technical footwork, flawless technique. Multiple angles dissect complex movements. Close-ups on point of contact, body positioning, and concentrated expressions. Visual breakdown of signature moves with freeze frames at critical moments. Poetry in motion.

elements.cameraMovement: Motion control precision, bullet-time arrays, macro lenses on contact points, gimbal follows
elements.subject: Elite athlete demonstrating signature skills
elements.scene: Minimalist training space, iconic venue, or isolated performance area
elements.motion: Technical precision, complex skill sequences, signature moves
elements.lighting: Dramatic spotlights, rim lighting for silhouettes, high-speed strobe
elements.style: Jordan's free-throw line dunk meets Matrix bullet-time

technicalSpecs.audioDesign: Breath control, contact sounds, ambient focus

bestPractices: Build sequences from simple to complex

examples.sampleOutput: Ronaldo's bicycle kick breakdown, Curry's shooting form analysis

templates.title: Sports Venue Atmosphere Captures
templates.description: Immersive venue experiences showcasing the energy and scale of sports environments

prompt.main: Epic venue atmosphere capture showcasing the cathedral of sports. Sweeping drone flights through massive stadiums, time-lapse of venues filling with fans. Detail shots of unique architectural elements, fan traditions, and venue character. The energy builds from empty morning venue to packed night game. Capture the pilgrimage, the rituals, the collective experience of sport as religion.

elements.cameraMovement: Drone flights through structures, cable cam over crowds, hyperlapse through concourses, crane establishing shots
elements.subject: Iconic sports venues and their atmosphere
elements.scene: Stadiums, arenas, historic grounds, unique sporting venues
elements.motion: Crowd waves, filling stands, pre-game build-up, environmental movement
elements.lighting: Magic hour establishment, stadium lights igniting, crowd phone lights
elements.atmosphere: Epic scale, tradition, anticipation, electric energy
elements.style: NFL Films grandeur meets modern drone cinematography

technicalSpecs.audioDesign: Crowd build-up, venue acoustics, tradition sounds

bestPractices: Capture both empty and full states

examples.sampleOutput: Champions League anthem venue shots, Super Bowl stadium opens

templates.title: Competition Highlight Reels
templates.description: Fast-paced montages of peak competitive moments and game-changing plays

prompt.main: High-energy competition highlights showcasing game-defining moments. Quick cuts between spectacular plays, crucial saves, winning goals. Each clip captures peak action - players mid-air, ball trajectory, defensive slides, reaction shots. Rhythm editing matches action intensity. Multiple angles of key plays, slow-motion replays of critical moments. The essence of competition distilled into pure excitement.

elements.cameraMovement: Whip pans between plays, crash zooms on action, tracking shots following plays
elements.subject: Athletes in crucial competitive moments
elements.motion: Peak action moments, game-changing plays, athletic excellence
elements.atmosphere: Intense competition, high stakes, electric moments
elements.style: SportsCenter Top 10 meets viral social media edits

technicalSpecs.colorGrading: Vibrant, high contrast, team colors pop
technicalSpecs.audioDesign: Commentary clips, crowd reactions, impact sounds

bestPractices: Match edit rhythm to action pace

examples.sampleOutput: NBA playoff highlights, World Cup best goals

templates.title: Fitness Transformation Journeys
templates.description: Inspiring visual narratives of physical and mental transformation through fitness

prompt.main: Powerful transformation story told through visual progression. Split-screen comparisons, time-lapse body changes, increasing weight loads, improving form. Intimate moments of struggle contrasted with breakthrough achievements. Documentary-style interviews intercut with training footage. The raw journey from day one to goal achieved, showing not just physical but mental transformation.

elements.cameraMovement: Intimate handheld for struggle, smooth tracking for progress, time-lapse locked frames
elements.subject: Individual on fitness transformation journey
elements.scene: Home workouts, gyms, outdoor training, everyday life integration
elements.motion: Progressive difficulty, form improvements, endurance building
elements.lighting: Honest available light, harsh gym fluorescents, triumphant golden hour

technicalSpecs.audioDesign: Personal testimony, effort sounds, emotional music

templates.title: Sports Technology Innovations
templates.description: Cutting-edge sports tech demonstrations with futuristic visual treatments

prompt.main: Futuristic sports technology showcase with advanced visual effects. HUD overlays displaying real-time biometric data, motion capture visualizations, AI-powered analysis graphics. Split-screen comparisons showing technology impact on performance. Holographic projections, data visualizations floating in space, seamless integration of AR elements. The future of sports performance made visible.

elements.cameraMovement: Smooth techno-crane movements, 3D space navigation, virtual camera paths through data
elements.subject: Athletes using cutting-edge technology, wearables, smart equipment
elements.scene: High-tech training facilities, innovation labs, futuristic environments
elements.motion: Tech-enhanced movements, data flow visualizations, UI animations
elements.lighting: Clean tech aesthetic, LED arrays, holographic glows
elements.style: Minority Report meets ESPN Sport Science

technicalSpecs.colorGrading: Tech blues and whites, clean modern palette
technicalSpecs.audioDesign: Electronic sounds, data processing, futuristic ambience

bestPractices: Integrate VFX seamlessly with live action
Make data visualizations clear and beautiful

examples.sampleOutput: Nike Breaking2 tech showcase, F1 data visualization packages
